creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Created attachment 254279
0001-devel-ocaml-ocamlbuild-Update-to-0.15.0.patc

Hi,

Please find the attached patch to update ocamlbuild to the latest release. devel/ocaml-cppo will have be rebuild as well, for its ocamlbuild plugin to keep working. Therefore the patch also bumps the PORTREVISION of devel/ocaml-cppo.

Thank you!
